textByHash.b5289b4a9c2aaf964ea07269bdac888202241db6: Back away citizen. Only mourners are allowed inside the headquarters.
textByHash.41a6f3d3fd7fac31eed173dc6ad8ebe92d1a80c3: Back away citizen. Several mourners are ill with food poisoning.
textByHash.0f35554d1b6df5c1cbf1e0f8ee869597c80cd73f: There are no doctors in West Ardougne, just that nurse south west of the chapel. You don't need to worry though, we'll soon have it sorted.
textByHash.e5dbf933d809d061482668de813c7c702271f71f: A doctor? I didn't think there were any left around here.
textByHash.dcdf795eaf333482b61e42a7e840be51732e1615: You heard right. Head on in and see what you can do.
textByHash.221258a1d6facc8d8da754b82200eab91d76541e: Oh dear oh dear. I feel terrible, I think it was the stew.
textByHash.0209e81ee0c9b762dce8dc34bb58c16a257a53e7: There is one mourner who's really sick. They're resting upstairs. You should see to them first.
textByHash.4f6568d1e1e3a3fb2eb653b8a3e743025b33be12: A doctor? At last! I don't know what I've eaten but I feel like I'm on death's door.
textByHash.835aa2b5dbd04f99b909df8c9c65c20fa924918c: Yes, I'd figured that out already. What can you give me to help.
textByHash.eed1fa70084ec20f1e5b04f4edf7288883b2437e: What? How will that help? What kind of doctor are you?
textByHash.f08df51f15b72039b677447bfd1672cb09232cd1: Pray for me? You're no doctor... You're an imposter!
textByHash.0883e698cb18fb2a42f3af653cb579011fe7e4d3: No, I'm too young to die! I've never even had a girlfriend.
textByHash.b4b0b68db740df6ce69f9f76ab044bc3e841e809: Wait a minute, where's your equipment?
textByHash.24920445a6e3d17211f80c68332bfa86687a8ad7: Sorry, I'd like to be left in peace.
textByHash.1744ac2d34d1622a726110fcaf1e578dedc118de: This will cut down you to size!
textByHash.f8dd34fc02dd0d5fe4b53a61da5ab6069f6bc865: It is good to see so many new recruits, soon no one will be able to stand against the power of the Death Guard.
textByHash.980ff056159542c580632d3f34c6b498336f5fea: Indeed it is. You should speak with Essyllt downstairs. He's in charge.
textByHash.bb990fa2a6b662419f229764cf8122c9bfcd97ca: Good day. Are you in need of assistance?
textByHash.340002deb53e66ee0d67b534381b328964204fb1: Are the townspeople causing you trouble?
textByHash.c8a71477f9e71ae34356d6a0e5f8ff42d0711f82: You will be surprised at how much help the brute force of the Guard can be.
textByHash.0a464d7eac50b3d7958c6f23e43e591d6033eada: Do I look friendly to you? I really must work on my scowl more.
textByHash.6fec7b5b3aceb601d661e6115a6a04c1399a14f6: What do you think you are doing? You are meant to be getting information out of him, not making friends!
textByHash.b84dc0e56830b74aea2ab19111fdb59359ececa0: Okay, but without the proper paperwork he stays in this room.
textByHash.118501fe6f81be44581ecedaecf820e8fb0dccef: You and that Edmond fella, you're looking very suspicious.
textByHash.67256987d601df2c7e7c8a0394b6cd83f1d95abc: Just the usual, everyone's sick or dying. I'm furious at King Tyras for bringing this plague to our lands.
textByHash.806236f0614eb13111f694b16bc5e0347d051da0: What are you up to with old man Edmond?
textByHash.e5dedc564e2c94eeffb9ffaf81e609a1fb5541ff: We know about everything that goes on in Ardougne. We have to if we are to contain the plague.
textByHash.7eec231758b0e48c09c56de77499cc9baf2c1aa8: I imagine she's caught the plague. Either way she won't be allowed out of West Ardougne, the risk is too great.
textByHash.3a978f7901262cce129957fa34aded9cab10ef81: Your hands are covered in mud.
textByHash.d17d4fff3ee5414413cb1f7d3988e099419f972a: Funny, you don't look like the gardening type.
textByHash.dff866842418820343e02d0564736d75bb3d87f5: If I find you attempting to cross the wall I'll make sure you never return.
textByHash.14d1cb7f650d8690f26d25725bda1f5e57e40da2: Hmmm, how did you get over here? You're not one of this rabble. Ah well, you'll have to stay. Can't risk you going back now.
textByHash.724127340ba22f0dda80350b2a8f4760abd697c8: We're working for King Lathas of East Ardougne. He has tasked us with containing the accursed plague sweeping West Ardougne.
textByHash.d77f211afeefa3a6e50ab5a370cc3aac5716869f: We also do our best to ease these people's suffering. We're nicknamed mourners because we spend a lot of time at plague victim funerals, no one else is allowed to risk attending.
textByHash.bc7bc08262f92f5001e641124ad7152ddb0f9863: It's a demanding job, and we get little thanks from the people here.
textByHash.7b7893f923e2800f863f9554eb40616032c17c34: Can't risk you being a carrier. That protective clothing you have isn't regulation issue. It won't meet safety standards.
textByHash.f9aeb6759ba12f3c6f5c6a6fb0448304a6145b6e: Ah yes, I've heard of her. A healer I believe. She must be mad coming over here voluntarily.
textByHash.63a138425950476ebf955b7edc0c7a5f28895457: I hear rumours she has probably caught the plague now. Very tragic, a stupid waste of life.
textByHash.e81c07066a5a8757aa4ee5e1642012ba46377621: I'd stand away from there. That black cross means that house has been touched by the plague.
textByHash.ca643cae5852531a85350170935e12d9cece6b7e: Sounds unlikely, even kidnappers wouldn't go in there. Even if someone is in there, they're probably dead by now.
textByHash.201aeb4cce1219655e3fa601306931b22c74cf4f: You don't have clearance to go in there.
textByHash.5d00a36d958d0a7b66714b3f756e39c4afffe648: Well you'd need to apply to the head mourner, or I suppose Bravek the city warder.
textByHash.66b143a42ac4452c61d71749da6cfee797c330d6: I wouldn't get your hopes up though.
textByHash.3bc57acd20fd9ce90e7115985cc0f6c32a2c89f7: That's irrelevant. You don't have clearance to go in there.
textByHash.655d89bfbca0b6ed45895ede30bbc59a2c17ec58: This is highly irregular. Please wait...
textByHash.731e3855409fdb73450e65648121564299faec6b: Hey... I've got someone here with a warrant from Bravek, what should we do?
textByHash.58ab8569547395e62036042661bfdb22ceb3e3ab: Stand back citizen, do not approach me.
textByHash.d2cb8949bb9a883412c54c8186185394b09666ac: Do you have a problem traveller?
textByHash.fc3a93f2934396eb2b2a480301ac6735c34cae96: I'm guarding the border to West Ardougne. No one except we mourners can pass through.
textByHash.de71bbfbedd87fc80b90c2872142d7fea58dd113: The plague of course. We can't risk cross contamination.
textByHash.c7cd196dec38ccf09c503635660d135a6f3289dc: It's all down to King Tyras of West Ardougne. It started came back from one of his visits to the lands west of here.
textByHash.149891cca61e4987cbff4a2898f939d0e3b1bab1: Some of his men must have unknowingly caught it out there and brought it back with them
textByHash.94e946fd218ddba5f5f8a860c43abbf3613be766: If he did he wouldn't care. I believe he wants his people to suffer, he's an evil man.
textByHash.ba1e1b222d878c7e102e3ca9b2e68320b3847d58: The first signs are typical flu symptoms. These tend to be followed by severe nightmares, horrifying hallucinations which drive many to madness.
textByHash.830f0e617ade584feb20fa1b3a9d2598e0df9a6c: It gets worse. Next the victim's blood changes into a thick black tar-like liquid, at this point they're past help.
textByHash.db2b6b36e77736dd49ff878e042aab89b26a7f41: Their skin is cold to the touch, the victim is now brain dead. Their body however lives on driven by the virus, roaming like a zombie, spreading itself further wherever possible.
textByHash.8e41d8897cfeb2d0db80acffb5877df2530818b1: This is no place for sight-seeing. Don't you know there's been a plague outbreak?
textByHash.565335cc3caddfe66213ef5f4e59aa175c62e4cb: Then I suggest you leave as soon as you can.
